goal: Generate a safe GUI operation plan for a CapCut or Jianying timeline demo.

gui_steps.expected_screen_state: The app home screen is visible.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Report that real GUI execution is unavailable but the plan was generated.

gui_steps.instruction: Create a new project and import placeholder media from an approved demo asset folder.
gui_steps.expected_screen_state: Placeholder media appears in the media bin.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Use screenshots only; do not access private draft folders.

gui_steps.instruction: Place one item on the timeline, add a title text clip, and inspect before export.
gui_steps.expected_screen_state: Timeline and title text are visible.
gui_steps.fallback_if_failed: Record the visible state and stop.

expected_result: A timeline GUI plan and screenshot evidence; no real export is required.
